name: Spider Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, sugar, baking soda, and salt until well combined.
3. Add egg, milk, oil, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix until smooth.
4. Form the dough into 8 equal balls (about 1/2 cup each).
5. Place the dough balls on the prepared baking sheet.
6. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until set around the edges.
7. Remove from oven and allow cookies to cool completely.
8. Spread a thin layer of chocolate frosting onto one cookie using an offset spatula.
9. Arrange the remaining cookies in a row, placing them slightly apart.
10. Cut black licorice into 8 pieces, each about 2-3 inches long.
11. Attach the licorice pieces to the frosting on the first cookie, positioning four pieces as legs extending outward (two on each side).
12. Repeat with the remaining cookies, arranging them in the same pattern.
